parameters.name: threshold
parameters.label: Release = Trigger Threshold
parameters.description: If on, the trigger threshold is also used as the release threshold.

parameters.name: threshup
parameters.label: Trigger Threshold
parameters.description: The channel level that must be exceeded in order to trigger a count.

parameters.name: threshdown
parameters.label: Release Threshold
parameters.description: A release count is triggered when the channel level drops below this threshold.

parameters.name: retrigger
parameters.label: Re-Trigger Delay
parameters.description: The amount of time after a trigger point that a new trigger may occur.

parameters.name: triggeron
parameters.label: Trigger On
parameters.description: Determines whether a trigger occurs on an increasing slope or decreasing slope when passing the trigger threshold. A release will occur on the opposite slope.

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Limit
parameters.description: Select limit options such as loop and/or clamp from the menu. The value will remain in the range from Min to Max.

parameters.name: limitmin
parameters.label: Limit Minimum
parameters.description: The minimum allowed count number.

parameters.name: limitmax
parameters.label: Limit Maximum
parameters.description: The maximum allowed count number.

parameters.name: offtoon
parameters.label: Off to On
parameters.description: The operation to perform when a trigger event (off to on) occurs.

parameters.name: on
parameters.label: While On
parameters.description: The operation to perform while the input remains triggered (on).

parameters.name: ontooff
parameters.label: On to Off
parameters.description: The operation to perform when a release event (on to off) occurs.

parameters.name: off
parameters.label: While Off
parameters.description: The operation to perform while the input is not triggered (off).

parameters.name: resetcondition
parameters.label: Reset Condition
parameters.description: This menu determines how the Reset input triggers a reset of the channel(s).

parameters.name: resetvalue
parameters.label: Reset Value
parameters.description: The channel(s) is set to this value when reset.

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: When On resets the channel(s) to the Reset Value. The Count will only begin counting again when Reset is Off.

parameters.name: resetpulse
parameters.label: Reset Pulse
parameters.description: Instantly resets the channel(s) to the Reset Value.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: countdown
parameters.label: Countdown
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: countup
parameters.label: Countup
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
